Title:
Verify successful login with 
valid username & password
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- OrangeHRM login page is loaded
Test Steps:
1. Enter "Admin" in the username field
2. Enter "admin123" in the password field
3. Click the Login button
Expected Result:
User is successfully logged in and 
redirected to the dashboard
Actual Result:
User successfully logged in and
 redirected to the dashboard

Title:

Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- OrangeHRM login page is loaded
Test Steps:
1. Enter "Admin" in the username field
2. Enter "admin143" in the password field
3. Click the Login button

Error should be displayed 
saying invalid credentials

Title:
Username with spaces
 before and after
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- OrangeHRM login page is loaded
Test Steps:
1. Enter " Admin " in the username field
2. Enter "admin123" in the password field
3. Click the Login button
Expected Result:
App should trim the spaces 
automatically and log the user in 
successfully
BUG:
Potential Bug: Username field does not 
trim leading/trailing spaces — 
causes login failure for valid users

Title:
Very long username 
(100 characters)
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- OrangeHRM login page is loaded
Test Steps:
1. Enter "A"(100 times) in the username field
2. Enter "Admin123" in the password field
3. Click the Login button
Expected Result:
Error should be displayed 
saying invalid credentials

Title:

 username
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- OrangeHRM login page is loaded
Test Steps:

2. Enter "Admin123" in the password field
3. Click the Login button

Error should be displayed
